title: App Settings - General - Account - Account delete - Starting with no WiFi connection
feature: App Settings - General - Account - Account Delete
scenario: Delete account with no WiFi connection, then retry after reconnecting
steps: Tap 'Later' on the 'Unable to perform task...' popup.
Verify the popup closes and returns to Device Settings.
Tap Delete icon again, then Confirm.
Verify the same error popup appears again.
Wait for a spinner to appear, followed by a confirmation dialog.
Verify the user is logged out and returned to the account screen.
Check that the user is not logged in via Poly Lens Menu > Support > Account.
Verify on the cloud side that the account was properly removed.
expected: When WiFi is off, tapping Delete + Confirm shows 'Unable to perform task...' popup. Tapping 'Later' closes the popup and returns to Device Settings. Tapping Delete + Confirm again and then 'Retry' shows the same error. After turning on WiFi and tapping 'Retry', a spinner appears followed by a confirmation dialog, the user is logged out and returned to the account screen. The user is not logged in via Poly Lens Menu > Support > Account, and the account is properly removed on the cloud side.
